title: hieracium longum
intro: Hieracium longum, also known as long-stalked hawkweed, is a plant species within the sunflower family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits associated with Hieracium longum include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing, as well as its antiseptic properties, which can aid in the prevention of infection. Hieracium longum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is sometimes used in traditional herbal remedies to treat various health conditions.
